output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?book ?bookLabel WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q1721182 ; rdfs:label ?seriesLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?seriesLabel) = "en" && CONTAINS(UCASE(?seriesLabel) , "LOYAL LEAGUE"))
  ?book wdt:P50 wd:Q31414190 ; wdt:P1545 ?series ; wdt:P577 ?pubDate ; rdfs:label ?bookLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?bookLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY ASC(?pubDate)
LIMIT 1
